# NutriStem® Affiliate Guide

> USA weight loss affiliate site promoting NutriStem stem cell supplement.

## Metadata
- Updated: 2026-06-01
- Target: United States all 50 states
- Offer: NutriStem (offer_id=29197, aff_id=21885)
- Affiliate URL: http://convert.ctypy.com/aff_c?offer_id=29197&aff_id=21885&file_id=343368

## About NutriStem
- Stem cell activation weight loss supplement
- Key ingredient: AFA Blue-Green Algae (25% stem cell mobilisation — peer reviewed)
- Price: $53–234 per bundle
- Rating: 4.9/5 from 94,000+ verified reviews
- Guarantee: 30-day money back
- Ships: All 50 US states
